subcodes.first_line: We have verily made manifest the Cause and revealed the utterance as a bounty from Us, yet the people comprehend not. Verily, those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا بینا الامر و انزلنا البیان فضلا من عندنا ولکن القوم لایفقهون ان الذین
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
